# llms.txt — tokenprice.fyi
# https://llmstxt.org/

# tokenprice.fyi is an independent LLM API pricing tracker.
# It records input, output, and cached token prices for 40+ models across 12 providers,
# updated daily, with full price history since launch.

> tokenprice.fyi: LLM API price tracker. Input, output, and cached token prices for Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek and more. Updated daily with full price history.

## Pages

- Pricing table (all models): https://tokenprice.fyi/
- Compare two models side by side: https://tokenprice.fyi/compare
- Market events & price change timeline: https://tokenprice.fyi/events
- Data sources & methodology: https://tokenprice.fyi/sources
- JSON API (pricing data): https://tokenprice.fyi/api/v1/models.json

## Providers

- Anthropic: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/anthropic
- OpenAI: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/openai
- Google: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/google
- xAI: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/xai
- DeepSeek: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/deepseek
- Meta: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/meta
- Mistral: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/mistral
- Cohere: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/cohere
- Alibaba: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/alibaba
- Moonshot AI: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/moonshot-ai
- Black Forest Labs: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/black-forest-labs
- Stability AI: https://tokenprice.fyi/providers/stability-ai

## Guide — starting models by task

- RAG support bot: https://tokenprice.fyi/guide/rag
- Coding agent: https://tokenprice.fyi/guide/coding-agent
- Support chatbot: https://tokenprice.fyi/guide/chatbot
- Classification / extraction: https://tokenprice.fyi/guide/classification
- Summarization: https://tokenprice.fyi/guide/summarization
- Agentic workflow: https://tokenprice.fyi/guide/agentic

## Learn — explainers on LLM API pricing

- What an AI feature is made of: https://tokenprice.fyi/learn/anatomy
- Reasoning & thinking tokens: https://tokenprice.fyi/learn/reasoning
- What drives the cost of common features: https://tokenprice.fyi/learn/feature-costs
- Cost-cutting strategies: https://tokenprice.fyi/learn/cost-cutting
- How LLM pricing works: https://tokenprice.fyi/how-pricing-works
